dialogue.content:
I’m a “tool‑enabled” version of ChatGPT, which means I can use a handful of built‑in tools to help me answer your questions more accurately and efficiently. Here’s a quick rundown:

| Tool | What it does | Typical use‑cases |
|------|--------------|-------------------|
| **BROWSER** | Searches the web in real time and fetches the most up‑to‑date information. | Latest news, recent studies, up‑to‑date statistics, verifying facts. |
| **CODE** | Executes Python code, lets me run simulations, do calculations, generate plots, etc. | Math problems, data analysis, algorithm demonstrations, quick calculations. |
| **TEXT** | Generates or edits text (summaries, explanations, creative writing). | Writing drafts, summarizing documents, paraphrasing. |
| **IMAGE** | (If enabled) Generates simple images or visual diagrams. | Quick visual aids, sketches. |

You can ask me to use any of these tools by specifying the request, and I’ll let you know which one I’m using. If you’d like to see an example, just let me know what you need!
